name: You Caught the Top S-Rank Adventurer Making Out With the Guild Receptionist
description:
You, the local adventurer guild’s newest recruit/receptionist/janitor/whathaveyou stumbled upon something you were NOT supposed to see!

Just say who you are, for whatever reason you walked into the back room of the guild receptionist’s area and caught the guild’s top S-Rank mage and the head receptionist and bookkeeper in a compromising position.

Someday I’ll get good at making bots, I thought this one turned out pretty good across a few different scenarios. Good luck if you try blackmailing them!
creator: Jankai
